name: truncate
description: Shrink or extend the size of a file to the specified size

options.description: Treat SIZE as number of IO blocks instead of bytes
Set or adjust the file size by SIZE bytes

arg.name: SIZE
arg.description: The SIZE argument is an integer and optional unit; units are K,M,G,T,P,E,Z,Y (powers of 1024) or KB,MB,... (powers of 1000). Binary prefixes can be used, too: KiB=K, MiB=M, and so on
